title: 日本ダービーの後に・Die Faszination

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I placed. What a fine result.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But, I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash was really impressive.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again... She was so cool, I
couldn't take my eyes off her...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Lady Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: They're all looking at me...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Everyone... I thank you for your support.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will show you a winning performance next time! I
promise!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I am still terribly worked up from
the race... I should be able to regain my
composure momentarily.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was... The crowd and other racers were more
excited than usual.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's making it hard for me to contain my
emotions... This is so unsightly of me...
choice_data_list: It's normal to feel frustrated after losing.
It's normal to feel frustrated after losing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But if I don't contain myself, I'll become even
greedier...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: If I do not pull myself together...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I fear I will never be satisfied with anything other
than victory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Is that really so? Placing is remarkable enough in
itself though.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's why placing within the top three has always
been my goal. But now...
choice_data_list: Let's win the next one, Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's begin planning for my next race at once.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We must prepare for the final race of the Classic
Triple Crown—the Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: Let's head back to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment we step inside the waiting room,
Eishin Flash receives a message from her parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"We can tell how hard you have been working. It's
fantastic that you were able to place in the top
three."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"It proves how strong you've become. You must
feel incredibly frustrated that you couldn't get
first."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
..."We wish we could give you a hug and cheer
you on in person right now."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"We hope the joy of your future victories will
keep you buoyed and fulfilled."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They do... Since they have no plans to visit Japan
during these three years...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The least I can do is report as many victories to
them as possible.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have accomplished all I sought to according to
my timetable. Let's keep up the momentum and
continue on.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But before that, there is something I would like to
report to you. I'm sure it is nothing serious, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can't accept this. Why are you removing the
Kikuka Sho from my schedule?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Eishin Flash informed me that her
leg felt strange, so I took her to see a doctor.
There, we found out it's because her muscles are
overfatigued.
choice_data_list: The pain will only get worse if you don't rest.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But there is more than enough time for me to fully
recover before the Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list:
If it looks like you'll be ready by then, then
we'll enter.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I cannot follow your logic. Doesn't it make more
sense to set the goal first so we can base our plan
around it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is such a grueling race that it's
said only top racers can win. If she insists on
running it, she will only become more fatigued.
choice_data_list:
Your goal is to see every race through to the
end, isn't it?

Your goal is to see every race through to the
end, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, but—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promise me that you'll adjust your schedule when
I deem it necessary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promise me that you'll adjust your schedule when
I deem it necessary.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Promises are... eternally binding...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. Let's remove the Kikuka Sho from my
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing is that I complete every
race...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: My perfect schedule...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I should ask my parents—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot discuss this with them. They must
never know that this failure was due to my own
mismanagement...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...And that I wasn't good enough.
